claims: WPHX PHP emission manifests include structured segment_plans metadata for the bounded include-side-effect direct script adapter.

The include-side-effects runner asserts direct_script_emission adoption mode, script/literal_output/return_exit segments, caller-scope locals, include semantics, observable effects, and unsupported=[].
The public-shell snapshot lane asserts the same direct-script segment-plan contract while preserving 11 generated-shape cases.
non_claims: This does not claim arbitrary Haxe expression lowering into direct PHP file scope.
This does not claim mixed PHP/HTML template ownership.
This does not claim broad direct-script ownership or existing WordPress Core include-file ownership beyond the minimized fixture.
This does not claim whole-file ownership for any WordPress file.
